info.name: Family Tribe App API Documentation
info.description: API for Family/Tribe app (Laravel). Set {{token}} from login response (Bearer). User, member, news, event, offer, and join_request IDs are numeric. Notification IDs are UUID strings (Laravel `notifications.id`). **Locations:** `GET /api/v1/regions` and `GET /api/v1/cities` are public (no token); use `country_id`, `region_id`, `search`, `per_page`; names are `{ar,en}` JSON objects. Login (`POST /auth/login`): optional `device_token` + `platform` (`ios`/`android`) to register push device. Join request (`POST /auth/join-request`): required `region_id` (must exist in `regions`); Saudi mobile format; password min 8 with letters and numbers; unique phone/email/national_id vs members and other pending requests. Family linking: members send pending_family_name for admin review; family_id is admin-only. News: urgent items first; responses include is_urgent, time_from/time_to, cover_image sizes, and gallery objects with url/medium/thumb.

item.name: Authentication
item.description: APIs for user authentication and registration.

request.description: Authenticate with phone or national ID. Optional `device_token` + `platform` (`ios`/`android`) register the same FCM row as `POST /devices` after success.

item.name: Locations
item.description: Public read-only lists for region/city pickers. No Authorization header required.

query.description: Optional: search in region name (Arabic or English).

request.description: Paginated regions. Each row includes `cities_count` and nested `country` (`id`, `code`, `name` ar/en). Sort: country_id then localized name.

response.name: success

query.description: Optional: search in city name (Arabic or English).

request.description: Paginated cities. Each row includes nested `region` and `region.country` with bilingual `name` objects.

response.name: success

variable.description: Numeric member user id: must match `user.id` from Login (same Bearer token), unless the token belongs to an admin.

formdata.description: Free-text family name (creates admin review request). Send empty to withdraw.

request.description: Update a member's profile (multipart + `_method` PUT). The path id must be your own user id from Login, or you must be an admin; otherwise the API returns 403 with a clear message.
